name: tape-lint
description: PreToolUse(Edit|Write) deny for `.tape` edits that introduce `@D` governance blocks with fields other than `do` / `dont`. Diff-aware — pre-existing violations are grandfathered, only newly-introduced fields (`why` · `tool` · `note` · `ref` · ...) are refused. Per-project enforcement: triggers on any `*.tape` path. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_TAPE_LINT=1.
